notes: Pass does not need to be returned to the library.
raw: The Trustees GO pass admits 2 adults and any children under the age of 18. With a Trustees GO pass from The Trustees of Reservations, you have access to natural, cultural, and historical places across Massachusetts, including the deCordova Sculpture Park. The deCordova Museum is closed for 2 years to update the HVAC system . When purchasing tickets select "GO PASS" and the number of tickets you need. Find a list of Trustees of Reservations locations here . Open hours and discount rates vary from place to place; please check The Trustees of Reservations web site for more information. The pass may be picked up a week in advance of the reservation and does not need to be returned.

source_phrases.max_adults: 2 adults and any children under the age of 18
